<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:宇志比古神社]]
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Expand Japanese|宇志比古神社}}

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ushihiko Shrine (Q48758332)
| native_name = 宇志比古神社
| image = Ushihiko shrine, Tokushima.jpg
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Ushihiko Shrine (Q48758332)
| coordinates = {{coord|34.161819|134.536858}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ushihiko Shrine'''|宇志比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|WD=Q845945}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shōsha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shōsha|WD=Q134917287}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|WD=Q135160342}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183177</ref>
* {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|WD=Q135018062}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183177</ref>
** Series ordinal: 2636


== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|ja|阿波国の式内社一覧|WD=Q11657514}}
** Series ordinal: 3
** P155: {{ill|Kaehimeno Shrine|lt=Kaehimeno Shrine|WD=Q135041301}}
** P156: {{ill|Okanoue Shrine|lt=Okanoue Shrine|ja|岡上神社|WD=Q48758325}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Naruto, Tokushima|lt=Naruto|ar|ناروتو (توكوشيما)|azb|ناروتو، توکوشیما|ca|Naruto (ciutat)|ceb|Naruto-shi|ce|Наруто (гӀала)|cs|Naruto (Tokušima)|de|Naruto (Tokushima)|en|Naruto, Tokushima|envoyage|Naruto (Tokushima)|es|Naruto (Tokushima)|et|Naruto|eu|Naruto (Tokushima)|fa|ناروتو، توکوشیما|fi|Naruto (Tokushima)|fr|Naruto (Tokushima)|gl|Naruto, Tokushima|ha|Naruto|hu|Naruto (Tokusima)|hy|Նարուտո (քաղաք)|id|Naruto, Tokushima|it|Naruto (Tokushima)|itvoyage|Naruto (Tokushima)|ja|鳴門市|javoyage|鳴門市|ko|나루토시|mzn|ناروتو، توکوشیما|nl|Naruto (Tokushima)|pl|Naruto (miasto)|pt|Naruto (Tokushima)|ro|Naruto (municipiu)|ru|Наруто (город)|simple|Naruto, Tokushima|sq|Naruto, Tokushima|sv|Naruto, Tokushima|tg|Наруто|th|นารูโตะ (จังหวัดโทกูชิมะ)|tl|Naruto, Tokushima|tr|Naruto (şehir)|tt|Наруто (шәһәр)|uk|Наруто (Токусіма)|vi|Naruto, Tokushima|war|Naruto, Tokushima|zh_classical|鳴門市|zh_min_nan|Naruto-chhī|zh_yue|鳴門|zh|鳴門市|WD=Q460812}}
* {{ill|Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=Awa Province|be|Ава (правінцыя, Сікоку)|cs|Provincie Awa (Tokušima)|de|Provinz Awa (Tokushima)|en|Awa Province (Tokushima)|es|Provincia de Awa (Tokushima)|fa|ولایت آوا|fr|Province d'Awa (Tokushima)|gl|Provincia de Awa, Tokushima|id|Provinsi Awa (Tokushima)|it|Awa (provincia, Tokushima)|ja|阿波国|ko|아와국 (난카이도)|lt|Avos žemė (Tokušima)|nl|Awa (Tokushima)|pt|Província de Awa (Tokushima)|ru|Ава (Сикоку)|simple|Awa Province (Tokushima)|sk|Awa (provincia, Tokušima)|sr|Провинција Ава (Шикоку)|tr|Awa (vilayet, Tokushima)|uk|Провінція Ава (Шікоку)|zh_min_nan|Awa-kok (Nankaidô)|zh|阿波國|WD=Q907457}}
* {{ill|Itano District, Tokushima|lt=Itano district|ceb|Itano-gun|en|Itano District, Tokushima|es|Distrito de Itano|fr|District d'Itano|id|Distrik Itano, Tokushima|it|Distretto di Itano|ja|板野郡|ko|이타노군|pl|Powiat Itano|uk|Повіт Ітано|zh|板野郡|WD=Q1156025}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|34.161819|134.536858}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183177</ref>

== image (P18) ==

* Ushihiko shrine, Tokushima.jpg

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 183177
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|WD=Q135159299}}

== modern shrine ranking (P13723) ==

* {{ill|Gō-sha|lt=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}

== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) ==

* 7480005003381

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Ushihiko Shrine|lt=Ushihiko Shrine|WD=Q135041302}}
* {{ill|Ushihiko Shrine|lt=Ushihiko Shrine|WD=Q135041302}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183177</ref>
** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}}

==References==

[[Category:Shikinaisha]]
[[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]]
[[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]]
[[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]
[[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]]
[[JA:宇志比古神社]]

{{wikidata link|Q48758332}}
[[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]]
[[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]

{{translated page|ja|宇志比古神社|version=107357315|comment=Imported full ja history}}
== Japanese Wikipedia content ==
{{神社
|名称= 宇志比古神社
|画像= [[File:Ushihiko shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px|宇志比古神社]]<br />拝殿
|所在地= {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|鳴門市|Q460812}}{{jalink|大麻町大谷|Q11442037}}字山田66
|位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}}
|祭神= {{jalink|丹波道主命|Q11368587|宇志比古尊}}<br />{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}}<br />{{jalink|仁徳天皇|Q313119}}<br />{{jalink|神功皇后|Q232803}}
|社格= {{jalink|式内社}}・{{jalink|郷社}}
|創建= 不詳
|本殿= 
|別名= 
|例祭= 
|神事= 
|地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇志比古<br />神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}}
}}
'''宇志比古神社'''（うしひこじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|鳴門市|Q460812}}{{jalink|大麻町大谷|Q11442037}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。

== 歴史 ==
創建年は不詳。{{jalink|天正|Q1145058}}年間（{{jalink|1573年|Q6678}}-{{jalink|1593年|Q6772}}）に{{jalink|長宗我部元親|Q1070082}}の乱入により社殿、古記録、社宝を焼失したが、後に再興された。江戸時代には八幡宮と呼ばれ、明治以降に宇志比古神社を称している。

徳島県内で現存する神社本殿では最古にあたり、{{jalink|2000年|Q1985}}（{{jalink|平成|Q234510}}12年）{{jalink|12月4日|Q2310}}に本殿が国の重要文化財に指定された。

== 祭神 ==
* {{jalink|丹波道主命|Q11368587|宇志比古尊}}
* {{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}}
* {{jalink|仁徳天皇|Q313119}}
* {{jalink|神功皇后|Q232803}}

== 交通 ==
* {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|鳴門線|Q861091}}{{jalink|阿波大谷駅|Q4829630}}より徒歩約10分。

== 参考文献 ==
* 『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603）

== 脚注 ==
{{Reflist}}

== 外部リンク ==
* [https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/176932 宇志比古神社本殿 文化遺産オンライン]

{{shinto-stub}}
[[category:徳島県の神社]]

==End Japanese==
[[Category:鳴門市の歴史]]
[[Category:鳴門市の建築物]]
[[Category:阿波国の式内社]]
[[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]]
[[Category:徳島県の重要文化財]]
[[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]]
